CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-22-2010 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the court orders the balance of this case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (212)
